{"code":"(def incidents (pagerduty__list_incidents {:status "triggered" :urgency "high"}))
(def high-triggered (filter #(and (= (:status %) "triggered") (= (:urgency %) "high")) incidents))
(defn body-text [incs]
  (if (empty? incs)
    "All clear."
    (str "High-urgency triggered incidents:\n" (clojure.string/join "\n" (map :id incs)))))
(if (empty? high-triggered)
  (do
